en: Three of a kind. Let's do this. That's it? Three guys?
ko: 트리플. 시작하자. 그게 다야? 세 명이야?

en: Two guys on the roof. Every guy gets a share. Five shares is plenty.
ko: 지붕 위에 두 명. 각자 몫이 있어. 다섯 몫이면 충분해.

en: Six shares. Don't forget the guy who planned the job.
ko: 여섯 몫. 일을 계획한 사람도 잊지 마.

en: He thinks he can sit it out and still take a slice.
ko: 그는 빠져나가서도 몫을 챙길 수 있다고 생각해.

en: I know why they call him the Joker. So why do they call him the Joker?
ko: 그를 조커라고 부르는 이유를 알겠어. 그런데 왜 조커라고 부르지?

en: I heard he wears make-up. Make-up?
Yeah, to scare people. You know, war paint.
ko: 응, 사람들을 겁주려고. 전투 화장 같은 거지.

en: All right, everybody! Hands up! Heads down!
ko: 자, 모두! 손 들어! 머리 숙여!

en: I said, hands up! Heads down!
Let's go, pal! I'm making a withdrawal here!
Here comes the silent alarm. And there it goes.
You're taking a dive on me!
That's funny. It didn't dial out to 911. It was trying to reach a private number. Is it a problem?
ko: 웃기네. 911에 전화가 안 걸렸어. 개인 번호로 걸려던 거야. 문제야?
